content:
## Page Section / Title
1.1 Logotype

## All Verbatim Text
- "AISalon Brand Guidelines | by Sightbox"
- "aisalon"
- "ai"
- "sa"
- "lon"
- "EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS"
- "57 PX"
- "20 MM"
- "1.1 Logotype"
- "REDUCTIONS"
- "To maintain the legibility of our brand, the maximum allowed reduction for graphic application, and digital platforms are shown."

## Visual Elements
- **Logos**: Five logo variations displayed horizontally:
  1. Full "aisalon" wordmark with tagline "EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS" below
  2. Stacked "ai" (top), "sa" (middle), "lon" (bottom) with tagline below
  3. Identical stacked version to #2
  4. Full "aisalon" wordmark (no tagline)
  5. Abbreviated "ais" wordmark
  All logos have 57 PX (20 MM) width indicators below them
- **Color palette**: Black and white (no color swatches shown)
- **Typography**: 
  - Primary typeface: Sans-serif (likely custom)
  - Sample text: "aisalon", "ai", "sa", "lon", "ais", "EMPOWERING AI CONNECTIONS"
  - Weight: Bold for main logo text, regular for tagline
- **Imagery / photography**: None
- **Iconography**: None
- **Layout grid**: 
  - Horizontal alignment of logo variations
  - Consistent spacing between each logo
  - Width indicators centered below each logo
- **Geometric / decorative elements**: Thin horizontal lines below each logo for width measurement

## Page Layout Summary
- Header: Top-left corner with "AISalon Brand Guidelines | by Sightbox" text
- Main content: Centered horizontal row of five logo variations
- Footer: Left-aligned section with "1.1 Logotype" heading, "REDUCTIONS" subheading, and explanatory text
- All elements aligned along horizontal center axis
- Generous white space around all content

## Design Rules / Guidance Visible on Page
- Maximum logo reduction size: 57 PX (20 MM) for graphic and digital applications
- Purpose: To maintain brand legibility at reduced sizes
- Multiple logo variations shown for different use cases (full wordmark, stacked, abbreviated)
